g.text: SIGTRAP 0x80 -> flip toggle on each syscall stop
ctx switch x2 | 1-10 us | TLB pressure
Event 10: PID 1002 entry -> toggle=0 (WRONG: shared toggle)
Event 9 : PID 1001 exit -> toggle=1 (reads RAX as retval)
Each PID progresses through its own FSM
entry stop : snprintf('[pid 1001] read(3, ') into slot
